'''padhapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cracknel|cracknel]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cracknel|cracknel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| padhapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædhæpæth|pædhæpæth]] || [[word:pædhæpæj|pædhæpæj]] || [[word:pædhæpæsh|pædhæpæsh]] || [[word:pædhæpæ|pædhæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhadhapath|padhadhapath]] || [[word:padhadhapaj|padhadhapaj]] || [[word:padhadhapash|padhadhapash]] || [[word:padhadhapa|padhadhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhapath|padhapath]] || [[word:padhapaj|padhapaj]] || [[word:padhapash|padhapash]] || [[word:padhapa|padhapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhafpath|padhafpath]] || [[word:padhafpaj|padhafpaj]] || [[word:padhafpash|padhafpash]] || [[word:padhafpaf|padhafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padhapatha|padhapatha]] || [[word:padhapaja|padhapaja]] || [[word:padhapasha|padhapasha]] || [[word:padhapaka|padhapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padhapath|padhapath]] || [[word:padhapaj|padhapaj]] || [[word:padhapash|padhapash]] || [[word:padhapa|padhapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padhapathal|padhapathal]] || [[word:padhapajal|padhapajal]] || [[word:padhapashal|padhapashal]] || [[word:padhapakal|padhapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padhapathatha|padhapathatha]] || [[word:padhapajaja|padhapajaja]] || [[word:padhapashasha|padhapashasha]] || [[word:padhapaka|padhapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padhapathan|padhapathan]] || [[word:padhapajan|padhapajan]] || [[word:padhapashan|padhapashan]] || [[word:padhapakan|padhapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padhapathaoro|padhapathaoro]] || [[word:padhapajaoro|padhapajaoro]] || [[word:padhapashaoro|padhapashaoro]] || [[word:padhapakaoro|padhapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
